occupation: Head of Agencies and Specialists at BackLite UK
headline: Commercial Lead / Former Co-Founder of IQOOH
summary:
Over 15 years’ experience leading integrated campaigns for a diverse portfolio of national and international clients across multiple sectors. Proven track record in managing high-value client relationships at board and executive levels, with a particular focus on driving revenue and business growth.

Founder of IQOOH, an independent out-of-home media business, which I launched and successfully exited two years after inception. This entrepreneurial venture strengthened my commercial and strategic capabilities, deepened my expertise in the OOH sector, and demonstrated and ability to build, scale, and sell a media business in a competitive landscape.

Specialises in new business development, including leading successful client pitches, securing major advertising contracts, and delivering award-winning campaigns. Skilled in building and mentoring high-performing teams to achieve commercial goals.

A confident communicator and natural networker with a deep understanding of brand strategy and the ability to translate client challenges into innovative, results-driven solutions. Adaptable, commercially minded, and passionate.
